daily_habits.name: Check Economic Calendar
daily_habits.description: Review upcoming economic events and their impact

daily_habits.name: Higher Timeframe Analysis
daily_habits.description: Analyze higher timeframes for trend confirmation

daily_habits.name: Check Sentiment
daily_habits.description: Review market sentiment and trader positioning

daily_habits.name: No Trades in 1st 5 mins
daily_habits.description: Wait 5 minutes after market open before trading

daily_habits.name: Review Major Markets
daily_habits.description: Check movements in major market indices

daily_habits.name: Always Enter A Stop
daily_habits.description: Never enter a trade without a predefined stop loss

daily_habits.name: No Meddling With Trades
daily_habits.description: Don't adjust stops or move trades unnecessarily

daily_habits.name: Only Take Planned Trades
daily_habits.description: Follow your trading plan, no impulse trades

daily_habits.name: 5 Trades Per Day Max
daily_habits.description: Don't exceed 5 trades in a single trading day

daily_habits.name: Stick To Daily Risk Rules
daily_habits.description: Adhere to your maximum daily loss limit

daily_habits.name: Journal Trades
daily_habits.description: Write journal entries for all trades taken

daily_habits.name: Take a Walk At Lunch
daily_habits.description: Step away from screens during lunch break

daily_habits.name: Mark Up Intraday Charts
daily_habits.description: Prepare and mark key levels on intraday charts

weekly_habits.name: Review All Trades
weekly_habits.description: Comprehensive review of all trades from the week

weekly_habits.name: Analyse Charts
weekly_habits.description: Deep analysis of price action and setups

weekly_habits.name: Write Goals For The Week
weekly_habits.description: Plan and write trading goals for upcoming week

weekly_habits.name: Read Trading Book
weekly_habits.description: Read trading or market-related educational material

weekly_habits.name: Analyze Losing Trades
weekly_habits.description: Deep dive into what went wrong in losses

weekly_habits.name: Plan New Setups
weekly_habits.description: Identify and plan new trading setups

weekly_habits.name: Relax and Unwind
weekly_habits.description: Take time to relax and manage trading stress
